title: conyza conica
intro: Conyza conica, also known as fleabane, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Asia and Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Conyza conica has been traditionally used to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, offering various health benefits. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
